name: easyship
description: Easyship Plugin for Codex  Shipping Rates, Labels & Tracking

interface.shortDescription: Compare shipping rates, create shipments, buy labels, and track packages across 550+ couriers.
interface.longDescription: Easyship workflows for comparing courier rates and creating shipments from code, purchasing labels and managing shipping documents for completed orders, and validating addresses and scheduling pickups for repeatable end-to-end fulfillment across 550+ couriers.
defaultPrompt: What are the shipping options for a 1.5kg package from Hong Kong to New York?
Create a shipment from San Francisco to London
What are my top shipping destinations this quarter?
